compressed_prompt: Create a product description poem, ending with a P.P.S. note. No commas, formal tone, concise details.
response:
**Ode to the Timeless Quill**

Behold this pen of grace refined
A weightless touch in hand enshrined
Its ink flows smooth on parchment bright
A dance of words in silver light

The nib is gold no fleck shall mar
Its craft endures both near and far
No smudge nor blot shall dare appear
Each stroke is sharp each line is clear

For scholars poets kings it gleams
A tool of dreams in waking schemes
Take up this wand of endless art
And write your name upon the heart

**P.S.** The case is leather dark and deep
A vault for treasures you shall keep

**P.P.S.** Should fate demand a finer blade
This quill shall never be outmade
